# Windows Desktop CMake configuration
# This file is required for Flutter Windows desktop support
# Generated by Flutter - do not edit
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.13)
project(moonplex LANGUAGES CXX)

set(BINARY_NAME "moonplex")
set(APPLICATION_ID "com.moonplex.app")

cmake_policy(SET CMP0063 NEW)

set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/lib")

# Configure build
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

add_subdirectory(flutter)
add_subdirectory(plugins)

set(FLUTTER_LIBRARY "${FLUTTER_MANAGED_DIR}/flutter_windows.dll")

add_executable(${BINARY_NAME} WIN32
  "main.cpp"
  "my_application.cpp"
)

apply_standard_settings(${BINARY_NAME})

target_link_libraries(${BINARY_NAME} PRIVATE flutter)
target_link_libraries(${BINARY_NAME} PRIVATE PkgConfig::SDL2)

add_dependencies(${BINARY_NAME} flutter_assemble)
